scope: 检查 plan-015 是否完整实现阶段 2 受控 MCP 写工具收尾：tools/list 注解、confirm 门禁、写工具覆盖、结构化错误、真实写入、文档同步、Non-Goals 和 ABH 原则
rationale: All 5 exit criteria pass. All 4 non-goals respected. 31/31 tests pass, doctor clean, MCP E2E write smoke passes. Two Low findings (stale initialize message, call_doctor dead code) do not block closure.

findings.finding: handle_initialize instructions say 'Write operations remain CLI-only' but write tools are now available
findings.recommendation: Update instructions text to reflect write tool availability

findings.finding: call_doctor() hardcodes empty issues list ignoring actual doctor() output
findings.recommendation: Remove dead code or wire it to call doctor() directly
Update to Done after audit recorded

findings.finding: audit_record MCP tool accepts findings only as pipe-separated strings
findings.recommendation: Acceptable for v0.2; future versions may benefit from structured finding objects
